variants: Nikolai Petrovich was raised in Peachbell Ridge, where he developed an early interest in language studies. Hailing from Peachbell Ridge, Nikolai Petrovich pursued his higher education at Barrowgate Technical College, specializing in Dutch grammar. Today, he works at Lacewing Innovations, where his knowledge is put to use in various projects.
